name: Single Span Abutments
description: Two abutments only — no intermediate piers (single-span bridge)

name: Multi-Span with Piers
description: Abutments and one or more intermediate pier bents

name: Integral Abutment
description: Abutment cast integral with superstructure — no expansion joint

name: Semi-Integral Abutment
description: Superstructure integral with abutment stem but bearing on footing

name: Cantilever Retaining Abutment
description: Reinforced concrete cantilever wall supporting embankment

name: Bank Seat / Spill-Through
description: Low bank-seat abutment with open spill-through slopes at each end

name: Culvert / Pipe Arch
description: Buried culvert substructure — headwalls and wingwalls only
